§6Industrial Solidification Machine§f

§aTurn liquids into solids — your tool for producing solid fuel, oil tar, and wax from petroleum fluids!§f

The §bIndustrial Solidification Machine§f is a general-purpose machine that converts various fluids into solid items through freezing, polymerization, and other processes. It is the opposite of the §bIndustrial Liquefaction Machine§f and is essential for producing solid fuel and oil-based crafting materials.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e4×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e12×§f Aluminium Plate
§b• §e4×§f Polymer Bar
§b• §e12×§f Capacitor
§b• §e4×§f Copper Coil

§6Key Recipes§f:
§b• Solid Fuel§f: §e13,000mB§f Petroil → §e1×§f. Many other fluids can also be solidified at varying rates (Diesel §e3,200mB§f, Kerosene §e700mB§f, etc.).
§b• Oil Tar§f: §e150mB§f Heavy Oil → §e1×§f Oil Tar.
§b• Crack Oil Tar§f: §e200mB§f Cracked Oil → §e1×§f.
§b• Coal Tar§f: §e200mB§f Coal Tar Creosote → §e1×§f.
§b• Wood Tar§f: §e1,000mB§f Wood Oil → §e1×§f.

§eTip§f: The solidification machine is much slower per-fluids than the Pyrolysis Oven but is available much earlier. Use it in early game for oil tar production and in late game for large-scale petroil solidification!
